seeed_9dof_init.message0: init Seeed 9DOF %1 ICM20600 address %2 magnetometer mode %3
seeed_9dof_init.tooltip: Create and initialize Grove - IMU 9DOF (ICM20600 + AK09918), and start I2C automatically.

seeed_9dof_read_motion.tooltip: Read the selected ICM20600 accelerometer or gyroscope axis.

seeed_9dof_read_magnetic.tooltip: Read the selected AK09918 magnetometer axis in microtesla or raw units.

seeed_9dof_read_temperature.tooltip: Read the ICM20600 built-in temperature sensor.

seeed_9dof_magnetic_ready.tooltip: Check whether AK09918 has new magnetic data ready.

seeed_9dof_magnet_status.tooltip: Return AK09918_err_type_t status code. Zero means OK.

seeed_9dof_error_text.tooltip: Convert an AK09918 error code to printable text.

seeed_9dof_set_motion_range.message0: Seeed 9DOF %1 set accel range %2 gyro range %3
seeed_9dof_set_motion_range.tooltip: Set ICM20600 accelerometer and gyroscope full-scale ranges.

seeed_9dof_set_sample_divider.tooltip: Set ICM20600 sample divider. Sample rate is about 1kHz/(1+divider).

seeed_9dof_calibrate_magnet.tooltip: Collect magnetic min/max values during the time window and store heading offsets.

seeed_9dof_heading.tooltip: Calculate tilt-compensated compass heading in degrees from acceleration and magnetic data.

seeed_9dof_print_all.tooltip: Print acceleration, gyroscope, magnetic field, temperature and heading values for debugging.

seeed_9dof_device_id.tooltip: Read the ICM20600 or AK09918 chip ID.
